title: Tangy Malaysian Flaxseed Grill
description: A festive, tangy grilled tofu dish infused with tamarind and lime, topped with toasted flax seeds for a nutty crunch, perfect for a kosher-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: pressed and sliced into 1/2" thick slabs

instructions: Press the tofu for at least 30 minutes to remove excess moisture, then slice into 1/2" thick slabs.
In a bowl, whisk together tamarind paste, lime juice, soy sauce, honey (if using), grated ginger, minced garlic, sliced chili, sesame oil, salt and pepper to create the marinate.
Place tofu slabs in the bowl and coat them thoroughly with the marinade, cover, and let them sit for 15 minutes to absorb flavors.
Preheat a grill or grill pan over medium heat and lightly oil the grates to prevent sticking.
Grill the tofu slabs for about 4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and the exterior is slightly charred.
While the tofu is grilling, toast flax seeds in a dry skillet over low heat until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Once grilled, transfer the tofu to a serving plate and drizzle any remaining marinade over it.
Sprinkle toasted flax seeds, chopped coriander, and green onions over the tofu.
Serve immediately with a wedge of lime for extra zing.
Enjoy the burst of tangy, savory, and nutty flavors!
